Did you submit the report?
I visited Fazenda Boa Esperanca last Monday.
I completed the checklist and I checked fifteen criteria.
I identified one critical non-conformity.
I wrote the corrective action plan.
I submitted the report on Tuesday.
Hi Carlos. How was the audit last week?
It was good. Last Monday, I visited Fazenda Boa Esperanca.
What did you find at the farm?
I found one critical problem. The producer did not have a valid certificate.
Did you write the corrective action plan?
Yes. I wrote the plan and I submitted the report on Tuesday.
Good. Did the producer send the new document?
Not yet. I identified the problem, but the farm did not send it yet.

Let me tell you about my week. Last Monday, I visited Fazenda Boa Esperanca. I left Virginia early, at six in the morning. At the farm, I completed the checklist and I checked fifteen criteria. I found one critical problem: the producer did not have a valid certificate. I talked to the farmer and I explained the situation. Then I wrote the corrective action plan and I submitted it to the team in Europe. I sent the report on Tuesday. It was a long week, but it was a good visit.

Hi Carlos, this is Emma with a quick note about last week. I read your report and I have two questions. First, you visited three farms, but you submitted only two reports. Did you finish the third one? Second, you identified one non-conformity at Fazenda Boa Esperanca. Did the producer send the new document? I approved the first two farms yesterday, but I did not approve the third one yet. Please send me an update today. Thank you, Carlos. Great work last week.
Last Monday, Carlos visited a coffee farm. He completed the audit checklist. He found one critical non-conformity. He wrote a corrective action plan. He submitted the report to the European team.
